Learn the basics of AI, how to use AI tools effectively, and how to apply AI in the workplace. This course covers prompt engineering, AI ethics, and responsible AI practices for everyday professionals.
prerequisites: No prior AI or programming experience required
learning_outcomes: Understand core AI concepts and terminology
Write effective prompts for AI tools
Evaluate AI outputs for accuracy and bias
Apply AI responsibly in professional settings
name: Google AI Essentials
